footer.refundPolicyDesc: Refund conditions are determined by the event organiser. Refund or change may apply according to event and campaign conditions. Please review the relevant event conditions before purchase.
footer.shippingPolicyDesc: Standard shipping (DE): 2–4 business days. Express shipping (DE): Orders placed before noon (Mon–Fri) delivered next business day. Digital ticket: Printable immediately after contract. Printed ticket is chargeable; delivered to those paying shipping. Shipping options are shown in the cart.
footer.liveStockDesc: Stock information is updated in real time.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This cookie policy explains how Bilet Ekosistemi uses cookies on our website. It has been prepared in accordance with European Union (EU) and German legislation (GDPR/DSGVO, ePrivacy).
cookies.whatAreDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) by the websites you visit. They are used for purposes such as ensuring the site operates correctly, remembering your preferences, and collecting usage statistics.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the basic functions of the site. Session management, security, and language preferences cannot work without these cookies. These cookies may be used without your consent under legal grounds.
cookies.functionalDesc: Used to remember your preferences (e.g. language, region) and provide you with a personalised experience. These cookies are used with your consent.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand site traffic and usage patterns. Data is usually processed anonymously or in aggregate. Used with your consent.
cookies.yourRightsDesc: You can change your cookie preferences at any time. You can delete or block cookies via your browser settings. You also have the right to access, rectify, delete, and object to the processing of your personal data under the GDPR.
cookies.contactDesc: You can contact us with questions about our cookie policy. For data protection requests, you may lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Germany: Landesdatenschutzbehörde).

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. By continuing to use our site, you accept our use of cookies.

information.title: Information
information.intro: This page contains the information we are required to provide before and during the services offered by Bilet Ekosistemi. It has been prepared in accordance with EU and German legislation (GDPR/DSGVO, BGB, distance selling).
information.dataProtectionIntro: The protection of your personal data is important to us. Below you will find information on how your data is processed.
information.controllerDesc: The data controller is Bilet Ekosistemi, a company based in Germany. You can reach us via the contact section on our website.
information.dataCollectedDesc: Data such as name, email, address and payment information may be collected during ticket purchases, account creation and site use. This data is used only for service provision and legal obligations.
information.legalBasisDesc: Data processing is carried out on the basis of contract performance (GDPR Article 6(1)(b)), legal obligations (Article 6(1)(c)) or legitimate interests (Article 6(1)(f)).
information.retentionDesc: Data is retained for the duration of the contract and statutory retention periods. Generally 10 years for tax and commercial documents, 3 years or a reasonable period after contract termination for other data.
information.rightsDesc: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection and complaint. You may lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Germany: Landesdatenschutzbehörde).
information.preContractIntro: Before purchasing tickets, we provide the following information:
information.sellerDesc: Bilet Ekosistemi is a company based in Germany. Full address and contact details are provided during purchase and in the contract.
information.productDesc: Event tickets and related services are offered. Prices, taxes and additional costs are displayed on the purchase screen.
information.paymentDesc: Payment options are specified during checkout. Digital tickets can be printed immediately after purchase. Delivery times and costs for printed tickets are specified separately.
information.withdrawalDesc: Consumers have the right to withdraw within 14 days. However, this right may be limited for ticket sales where the event date falls before the withdrawal period. Details are set out in the distance sales agreement.
information.contactDesc: You can contact us with any questions. For data protection requests, please contact our data protection officer.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.intro: Pursuant to German Telemedia Act (TMG) § 5, our legal information is provided below.
impressum.disputeDesc: EU consumers may use the online dispute resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

distanceSales.title: Distance Sales Agreement
distanceSales.intro: This agreement governs the distance sale of event tickets between Bilet Ekosistemi and the consumer. It has been prepared in accordance with the German Civil Code (BGB) and the EU Consumer Rights Directive.
distanceSales.partiesDesc: Seller: Bilet Ekosistemi (based in Germany). Buyer: The consumer accepting the agreement. Seller details are provided on the Impressum page.
distanceSales.subject: Subject of the Agreement
distanceSales.subjectDesc: Distance sale of event tickets and related services. Product/service details, prices and taxes are displayed on the purchase screen.
distanceSales.contractDesc: The contract is formed when the buyer clicks the purchase button and confirms payment details. The seller sends order confirmation by email.
distanceSales.priceDesc: All prices include taxes. Any additional shipping costs are stated during purchase. Payment options: credit card, debit card, etc. Payment is taken when the contract is formed or immediately thereafter.
distanceSales.deliveryDesc: Digital tickets: Printable immediately after purchase. May be sent by email. Printed tickets: 2–4 business days by standard shipping (Germany). Delivery times and costs are specified separately.
distanceSales.withdrawalDesc: Consumers have the right to withdraw within 14 days. However, for ticket sales where the event date falls before the end of the withdrawal period, this right may be limited with the consumer's explicit consent (BGB § 312g). Withdrawal requests must be made in writing (email).
distanceSales.warrantyDesc: The seller warrants that the product conforms to the contract. In case of non-conformity, the consumer may request repair, replacement or price reduction. In the event of event cancellation, the refund policy applies.
distanceSales.liabilityDesc: The seller is not liable for indirect damages except in cases of intent or gross negligence. Statutory liability remains unaffected.
distanceSales.lawDesc: German law applies. EU consumers benefit from mandatory protective provisions of their country of residence.
distanceSales.contactDesc: For questions about the agreement, please use the contact details on the Impressum page.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms of use govern the use of the Bilet Ekosistemi website and platform. By using the site, you agree to these terms.
terms.scopeDesc: These terms apply to event ticket sales, venue and artist information, news and all related services. Ticket purchases are also governed by the Distance Sales Agreement.
terms.accountDesc: Some services may require account creation. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide. You must keep your account credentials confidential and report any unauthorised use.
terms.useDesc: You may use the platform only in a lawful manner and in accordance with these terms. Prohibited conduct includes: false information, fraud, distributing malicious software, unauthorised access to systems, infringing others' rights.
terms.contentDesc: Texts, images, logos and software on the site are owned by Bilet Ekosistemi or licensors. Unauthorised copying, distribution or commercial use is prohibited.
terms.ticketsDesc: Ticket purchases are subject to the Distance Sales Agreement and relevant event terms. Prices, cancellation and refund conditions are displayed before purchase.
terms.liabilityDesc: The platform is provided "as is". Uninterrupted or error-free operation is not guaranteed. The seller is not liable for indirect damages (data loss, business loss, etc.). Statutory liability remains unaffected.
terms.terminationDesc: Your account may be suspended or closed in case of violation. You may also close your account at any time.
terms.changesDesc: These terms may be amended. Material changes will be announced on the site. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.lawDesc: German law applies. The competent court for disputes is the seller's place of business. EU consumers may refer to the courts of their country of residence.
terms.contactDesc: For questions, use the contact details on the Impressum page.
